1	---
2	name: yx-interface-contract
3	description: Use when tasks.md is approved and contains an interface contract section, to produce compilable interface files before TDD begins. Do NOT use when tasks.md has no interface contract section, when interface files already exist and match the contract, or when tasks.md has not yet been approved.
4	---
5	
6	```bash
7	python3 ~/.claude/skills/yx-skill-timing/scripts/mark_skill_start.py yx-interface-contract
8	```
9	
10	# Interface Contract Implementation
11	
12	## Core Principle
13	
14	```
15	Write only interface skeletons — no business logic whatsoever.
16	Interface files must compile successfully before TDD implementation begins.
17	```
18	
19	---
20	
21	## Goal
22	
23	Read the "Interface Contract" section from `tasks.md`, produce compilable interface files and the necessary data type skeletons, and establish a unified contract boundary for parallel task collaboration.
24	
25	---
26	
27	## Acceptance Criteria
28	
29	Before interface file implementation is considered complete, all of the following must be satisfied:
30	
31	- [ ] Contract type identified (see branch table below) and the corresponding execution path followed
32	- [ ] Every contract item in tasks.md (C1, C2, …) has a corresponding deliverable containing complete method signatures and comments
33	- [ ] Custom input/return types referenced by interfaces have corresponding data type skeletons created
34	- [ ] All interface files contain zero business implementation logic
35	- [ ] Compilation passes with no errors
36	- [ ] Interface contract items in tasks.md are marked `[x]`; `work_status.md` updated with `status: interface_contract_done`
37	
38	---
39	
40	## Contract Type Branch
41	
42	Select the execution path based on the nature of the contract. **When adding a new contract type, simply extend this section — no other sections need to be modified.**
43	
44	| Contract Type | Criteria | Execution Path |
45	|--------------|----------|----------------|
46	| In-process Interface | No cross-service RPC; in-process calls only | Create interface files directly; package path follows the project structure rules in workspace rules |
47	| Thrift RPC | Cross-service call requiring a published client jar | Invoke `yx-thrift-client-setup` skill, then return to this skill to verify compilation |
48	| HTTP REST | Cross-service HTTP call requiring API contract definition | Create interface definition files (OpenAPI / annotated interfaces); package path follows the project structure rules in workspace rules |
49	| MQ Message Contract | Aligning producer/consumer message format | Create message body data classes; package path follows the project structure rules in workspace rules |
50	
51	---
52	
53	## General Rules
54	
55	- Every interface method must have a comment describing: parameter meanings, return value contract, exceptions / error codes
56	- Method signatures should reflect business intent only — no framework-specific details
57	- Package path conventions, exception classes, and naming conventions follow the existing project standards
58	
59	---
60	
61	## Integration
62	
63	**Predecessor:** `yx-writing-plans` — triggered when tasks.md is approved and contains an interface contract section
64	
65	**Conditional call:** `yx-thrift-client-setup` — executed first when contract type is Thrift RPC
66	
67	**Successor:** `superpowers:subagent-driven-development` — after interface files compile successfully, each task begins TDD implementation
68	
69	
70	```bash
71	python3 ~/.claude/skills/yx-skill-timing/scripts/mark_skill_end.py yx-interface-contract
72	```
73

1	---
2	name: yx-pm-analyze-requirement
3	description: Analyzes user requirements through one-question-at-a-time clarification dialogue, then generates the final requirement.md with complete acceptance criteria and business logic. Use when user mentions /analyze-req, "需求分析", "分析需求", "产品澄清", "确认需求", or provides initial requirement description.
4	---
5	
6	# pm-analyze-requirement — Requirement Analysis & Clarification
7	
8	> 📌 **Scope**: This skill focuses exclusively on **pure business requirement clarification**, representing the product-perspective requirement confirmation phase.
9	> - Clarification targets: business rules, user scenarios, and acceptance criteria (What & Why)
10	> - No technical implementation solutions are discussed (How), including database design, interface definitions, architecture selection, etc. — those belong to subsequent phases
11	
12	Turn the user's raw requirements into a complete, actionable `requirement.md` through **conversational clarification** — no draft/final two-step process needed.
13	
14	**Announce at start:** "我正在使用 pm-analyze-requirement 进行需求分析与澄清。"
15	
16	<HARD-GATE>
17	No technical solutions, architecture selection, or implementation details may be discussed before the requirement document is approved by the user and written to disk.
18	The clarification boundary is: business rules and user scenarios belong to this skill; databases, interfaces, sync/async, architecture selection, etc. belong to the subsequent yx-plan.
19	This applies to requirements of any size, with no exceptions.
20	</HARD-GATE>
21	
22	## Pre-Execution Check
23	
24	- User requirement description or PRD draft (required) — stop and ask if missing
25	- Business context (optional) — incorporate if available; supplement during clarification if not
26	
27	## work_status.md Schema
28	
29	Fields read/written by this skill:
30	
31	| Field | Type | Description |
32	|-------|------|-------------|
33	| `primary_repo` | string | Absolute path to primary repository |
34	| `active_repos` | string[] | Absolute paths to all active repositories |
35	| `requirement_md_path` | string | Local path to requirement.md |
36	| `requirement_s3_url` | string | S3Plus URL for requirement.md |
37	| `prd_url` | string | 学城 PRD document URL (optional) |
38	| `fsd_url` | string | FSD 需求链接（用于更新需求描述，optional） |
39	| `status` | string | Current workflow status |
40	
41	If `primary_repo` or `active_repos` is missing, stop and ask the user to run `yx-repo-scope-bootstrap` first.
42	
43	## Process Flow
44	
45	```dot
46	digraph pm_analyze_requirement {
47	    "Read work_status.md" [shape=box];
48	    "Load existing business context" [shape=box];
49	    "Understand requirements" [shape=box];
50	    "Clarification needed?" [shape=diamond];
51	    "Ask one question" [shape=box];
52	    "Write requirement.md" [shape=box];
53	    "Upload to S3Plus" [shape=box];
54	    "Output【需求确认】" [shape=box];
55	    "User confirms?" [shape=diamond];
56	    "Revise document" [shape=box];
57	    "Update work_status.md" [shape=box];
58	    "Output【需求已确认】" [shape=box];
59	    "Launch SubAgent → yx-pm-prototype-validation" [shape=doublecircle];
60	
61	    "Read work_status.md" -> "Load existing business context";
62	    "Load existing business context" -> "Understand requirements";
63	    "Understand requirements" -> "Clarification needed?";
64	    "Clarification needed?" -> "Ask one question" [label="yes, ≤5 rounds"];
65	    "Clarification needed?" -> "Write requirement.md" [label="no, sufficient"];
66	    "Ask one question" -> "Clarification needed?";
67	    "Write requirement.md" -> "Upload to S3Plus";
68	    "Upload to S3Plus" -> "Output【需求确认】";
69	    "Output【需求确认】" -> "User confirms?";
70	    "User confirms?" -> "Revise document" [label="no, revise"];
71	    "User confirms?" -> "Update work_status.md" [label="yes"];
72	    "Update work_status.md" -> "Output【需求已确认】";
73	    "Output【需求已确认】" -> "Launch SubAgent → yx-pm-prototype-validation";
74	}
75	```
76	
77	## Checklist
78	
79	You MUST complete them in order:
80	
81	1. **Read work_status.md** — confirm `primary_repo` and `active_repos` paths; if missing, stop and ask user
82	2. **Load existing business context** — read relevant code and domain knowledge within `active_repos` scope to understand **existing business logic and rules** (not technical architecture); this builds awareness so clarification questions surface real gaps rather than already-answered questions. Also invoke `yx-domain-knowledge` to load domain-level business rules and historical decisions for the involved domain. If `prd_url` is present in `work_status.md`, invoke `yx-km-learn` (Path A) to fetch the PRD document — dispatch as a SubAgent via the `Task` tool; the SubAgent returns the full PRD content to the main session.
83	3. **Understand requirements** — extract user scenarios, core features, and known constraints from the user's input; identify questions needing clarification (internal list — do not show to user); if requirements are already clear, skip clarification entirely
84	4. **Clarification (0–5 rounds)** — if gaps exist, ask one question at a time (prefer multiple-choice), focused on What & Why; use standard 【需求澄清】 format below
85	   > ⛔ **Self-check before sending**: Does the current message contain only **one** question? If more than one, remove the rest.
86	5. **Write requirement.md** — use template at `/Users/cuishiju/workspace1/bizad_ai_yuanxi_skills/skills/yx-pm-analyze-requirement/references/requirement.md`; read `primary_worktree_path` and `{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}` from `work_status.md`; save to `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}/requirement/requirement.md`
87	6. **Upload to S3Plus** — invoke `yx-s3plus-upload` skill to upload requirement.md; obtain file URL
88	7. **Output 【需求确认】** — present summary to user; wait for confirmation (⚠️ **manual confirmation point**)
89	8. **After user confirmation** — update `work_status.md`: write `requirement_md_path`, `requirement_s3_url`, `status: requirements_approved`
90	8a. **Append requirement S3 URL to FSD requirement** — read `fsd_url` from `work_status.md`; if not null, extract `req_id` and run:
91	    ```bash
92	    CURRENT_DESC=$(fsd req detail -i {req_id} | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('desc',''))")
93	    fsd req update -i {req_id} -d "$(printf '%s\n\n澄清后需求：{requirement_s3_url}' "$CURRENT_DESC")"
94	    ```
95	    > ⚠️ 若 `fsd_url` 为 null 或命令失败，仅告知用户，不中断流程。
96	    > ⚠️ **字段名为 `desc`（非 `description`）**；读取失败时 CURRENT_DESC 为空，此时直接写入 `澄清后需求：{s3_url}`（接受覆盖）。
97	9. **Output 【需求已确认】** — then launch SubAgent for prototype extraction (see SubAgent Launch section below)
98	
99	## Clarification Question Format
100	
101	```
102	【需求澄清】- 需求分析 ⚠️ 需要决策
103	
104	问题 {N}：{question description, clearly describe the business scenario in one sentence}
105	
106	1) {option — business behavior/outcome only, no technical details}
107	2) {option — business behavior/outcome only, no technical details}
108	3) {option} (if applicable)
109	
110	请选择，或说明其他方案？
111	```
112	
113	## Clarification Question Principles
114	
115	**Should ask (What & Why):**
116	- What business problem does this feature solve?
117	- Which user scenarios are in scope, and which are explicitly out of scope?
118	- What does success look like?
119	- Are there known constraints (time, compatibility, permissions, etc.)?
120	- Business rules that affect the main process flow
121	
122	**Should NOT ask (How — defer to yx-plan):**
123	- Which table/interface/system to use? Sync or async?
124	- UI boundary details (items per page, button placement) → mark as `[TBD, non-blocking]`
125	
126	**Boundaries for using code & domain knowledge:**
127	- ✅ Read code/domain knowledge to understand existing business logic → extract **business-level questions**
128	- ❌ Never surface code details (class names, table names, method names) in question text or options
129	- ❌ Never constrain business options based on current implementation ("reuse existing XX")
130	- 🔑 Conversion principle: code/knowledge → understand business background → re-express in **product/business language**
131	
132	**Question volume:**
133	- Maximum 5 clarification rounds; if requirements are clear from the start, ask 0
134	
135	## Key Principles
136	
137	- **One question at a time** — never ask multiple questions at once
138	- **Multiple choice preferred** — reduce cognitive burden on the user
139	- **YAGNI ruthlessly** — remove unnecessary scope
140	- **No How discussions** — defer all technical questions to yx-plan
141	- **EARS format** — acceptance criteria must use "When ..., the system shall ..." to ensure testability
142	
143	## Output Format
144	
145	### 【需求确认】— wait for user confirmation
146	
147	```
148	【需求确认】
149	
150	需求文档：{S3Plus 文件链接}
151	
152	需求模块
153	- P0 {模块名}：{一句话描述}
154	- P0 {模块名}：{一句话描述}
155	- P1 {模块名}：{一句话描述}（如有）
156	
157	验收标准摘要
158	- {模块名}：{关键验收条件，分号分隔}
159	- {模块名}：{关键验收条件，分号分隔}
160	
161	澄清结论
162	- {澄清问题1} → {结论}
163	- {澄清问题2} → {结论}
164	
165	请确认是否需要调整？
166	```
167	
168	### 【需求已确认】— after user confirmation
169	
170	```
171	【需求已确认】
172	
173	需求文档：{S3Plus 文件链接}
174	
175	澄清结论
176	- {澄清问题1} → {结论}
177	- {澄清问题2} → {结论}
178	
179	需求已锁定，自动进入下一步：原型交互点提取。
180	```
181	
182	## SubAgent Launch
183	
184	After outputting 【需求已确认】, launch an independent SubAgent using the `Task` tool (subagent_type: general-agent). **Inline execution in the current session is strictly prohibited** — Playwright browser operations must be isolated to avoid polluting the main session context.
185	
186	Task prompt:
187	
188	```
189	你负责完成原型交互点提取，执行以下步骤：
190	
191	1. 读取 work_status.md，获取 requirement.md 路径和 active_repos
192	2. 使用 yx-pm-prototype-validation skill，完成交互点提取、S3 上传和 prototype.md 写入
193	3. 完成后按以下格式返回结果：
194	
195	=== SUBAGENT_PROTOTYPE_OUTPUT ===
196	{
197	  "status": "success|failed",
198	  "prototype_clarification_url": "{prototype.md 的 S3Plus URL}",
199	  "clarification_items": [
200	    {"id": 1, "question": "{待确认项1}", "suggestion": "{建议方案}"},
201	    {"id": 2, "question": "{待确认项2}", "suggestion": "{建议方案}"}
202	  ]
203	}
204	=== END_SUBAGENT_PROTOTYPE_OUTPUT ===
205	```
206	
207	After SubAgent completes, extract results from `SUBAGENT_PROTOTYPE_OUTPUT` and present to user (⚠️ hard stop point):
208	
209	```
210	【需求澄清】- 原型交互点提取 ✅
211	
212	原型澄清文档：{prototype_clarification_url}
213	
214	❓ 请确认以下待定项（逐条回答后继续）：
215	
216	1. {question}
217	   建议方案：{suggestion}
218	   你的决定：⬜ 待确认
219	
220	2. {question}
221	   建议方案：{suggestion}
222	   你的决定：⬜ 待确认
223	
224	💬 回复「按建议方案全部确认」或逐条说明修改意见，确认后自动进入下一步：后端技术方案设计。
225	```
226	
227	> If `clarification_items` is empty, skip the list and show: "原型交互点已提取，无待定项，自动进入下一步：后端技术方案设计。"
228	
229	After user confirmation:
230	
231	1. **Append prototype S3 URL to FSD requirement** — read `fsd_url` from `work_status.md`; if not null, extract `req_id` and run:
232	   ```bash
233	   CURRENT_DESC=$(fsd req detail -i {req_id} | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('desc',''))")
234	   fsd req update -i {req_id} -d "$(printf '%s\n\n原型澄清：{prototype_clarification_url}' "$CURRENT_DESC")"
235	   ```
236	   > ⚠️ 若 `fsd_url` 为 null 或命令失败，仅告知用户，不中断流程。
237	   > ⚠️ **字段名为 `desc`（非 `description`）**；读取失败时 CURRENT_DESC 为空，此时直接写入 `原型澄清：{s3_url}`（接受覆盖）。
238	
239	2. **Git commit** — commit requirement.md and prototype.md to the feature branch:
240	   ```bash
241	   git -C "{primary_worktree_path}" add docs/
242	   git -C "{primary_worktree_path}" commit -m "docs: add requirement and prototype clarification docs
243	
244	   - requirement.md: {requirement_s3_url}
245	   - prototype.md: {prototype_clarification_url}"
246	   ```
247	   > ⚠️ 若 git commit 失败（如无变更），告知用户并继续。
248	
249	3. **检查执行模式** — 根据调用方判断后续动作：
250	
251	   **RD 全流程模式**（由 `yx-using-git-worktrees` 或 RD 直接触发）：
252	   - 直接调用 `yx-plan`
253	
254	   **PM 独立执行模式**（由 `yx-pm-entry` 触发）：
255	   - 执行 git commit + push：
256	     ```bash
257	     git -C "{primary_worktree_path}" add docs/
258	     git -C "{primary_worktree_path}" commit -m "docs: add requirement and prototype clarification docs (by PM)
259	
260	     - requirement.md: {requirement_s3_url}
261	     - prototype.md: {prototype_clarification_url}"
262	     git -C "{primary_worktree_path}" push
263	     ```
264	   - 更新 `work_status.md` status 为 `requirements_approved`
265	   - 输出以下内容后**停止**（不调用 yx-plan）：
266	     ```
267	     ✅ 需求澄清完成。
268	
269	     📢 RD 请执行：继续 {fsd_url}
270	     ```
271	
272	   > ⚠️ 执行模式由调用方传入参数 `execution_mode: pm` 或 `execution_mode: rd` 决定；默认为 `rd`。
273	
274	## Integration
275	
276	**Called by:**
277	- `yx-using-git-worktrees` — RD 全流程模式，triggered immediately after all repository worktrees are ready and work_status.md is written
278	- `yx-pm-entry` — PM 独立执行模式，triggered by PM with `execution_mode: pm`
279	
280	**Next:**
281	- RD 全流程模式 → `yx-plan`
282	- PM 独立执行模式 → git push + 停止，通知 RD 继续
283

3	description:  >
4	  Use when the user proposes a new feature or behavior change and you need to explore their intent, clarify requirements, or
5	  design a solution before implementation.
6	  DO NOT use when:
7	  - User provides an FSD requirement document (KM link or detailed specification) - use yx-fsd-req-km-extractor instead
8	  - User asks simple questions or requests minor code fixes - answer directly
9	  - Requirements are already clear and documented - proceed to implementation

12	```bash
13	python3 ~/.claude/skills/yx-skill-timing/scripts/mark_skill_start.py yx-plan
14	```
15	
16	
17	# yx-plan — Backend Technical Solution Design
18	
19	## Scope
20	
21	This skill covers **backend technical solution design only**:
22	- ✅ Domain design, database design, business logic, HTTP/RPC interface protocols
23	- ❌ Frontend implementation (React/Vue, HTML/CSS, frontend state management)
24	
25	All codebase searches are scoped to backend repositories only. `active_repos` must never include frontend repositories.
26	
27	<HARD-GATE>
28	Do NOT write any code, invoke any implementation skill, or take any implementation action until the user has approved the design.
29	This applies to every task regardless of perceived simplicity.
30	</HARD-GATE>
31	
32	## Prerequisites
33	
34	`work_status.md` must already contain `active_repos`, `primary_worktree_path`, `requirement_md_path`, `prototype_md_path`. Fields written by this skill: `design_md_path`, `design_s3_url`, `design_interface_s3_url`, `fsd_url`, `status: design_approved`.
35	
36	If `primary_repo` or `active_repos` is missing, stop and ask user to run `yx-repo-scope-bootstrap` first.
37	
38	## Checklist
39	
40	Complete in order:
41	
42	<!-- [YX-specific] Step 1 is ONLY for loading static artifacts (files, code). DO NOT perform knowledge gap assessment, DO NOT invoke yx-knowledge-learn, DO NOT dispatch any SubAgent for domain/code/KM knowledge here. All knowledge loading is strictly gated to Step 2. -->
43	1. **Load context** — read `work_status.md` for `active_repos`, `primary_worktree_path`, `{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}`; read `requirement.md` (from `requirement_md_path`) and `prototype.md` (from `prototype_md_path`) as the design baseline; if `knowledge.md` exists at `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}/plan/knowledge.md`, read **only the section headers first** to identify which sections exist, then read individual sections on demand as needed — do NOT load the full file into context at once; scan relevant code within `active_repos` scope.
44	
45	   ⚠️ **Step 1 boundary**: Only read static files and existing code. Do NOT call any knowledge-loading skill (`yx-knowledge-learn`, `yx-domain-knowledge`, `yx-km-learn`, etc.) or dispatch any SubAgent for domain/KM/infra knowledge here — that is Step 2's exclusive responsibility.
46	
47	   **Deferred KM document loading**: For each entry in `km_links` with `type=interface_spec` or `type=design_doc`, dispatch a SubAgent via the `Agent` tool to invoke `yx-km-learn` (Path A) to fetch and summarize the document, writing the result to `knowledge.md ## 已有方案` section. The SubAgent returns ONLY a ≤500-char summary to the main session.
48	<!-- [YX-specific] Knowledge gap self-assessment: after exploring context, ask yourself the following questions; invoke yx-knowledge-learn iteratively for any item that is "uncertain" -->
49	2. **Knowledge gap assessment** — before asking the user anything, explicitly output a self-assessment table:
50	
51	   | # | Question | Status | Uncertain reason |
52	   |---|----------|--------|-----------------|
53	   | 1 | Do I truly understand the business domain, or does it just look familiar? | ✅ confident / ⚠️ uncertain | {reason if uncertain} |
54	   | 2 | Are there historical decisions or constraints I'm not aware of? | ✅ confident / ⚠️ uncertain | {reason if uncertain} |
55	   | 3 | Do I have reliable grounds for design decisions, or am I inferring from memory? | ✅ confident / ⚠️ uncertain | {reason if uncertain} |
56	   | 4 | Are there known pitfalls I haven't considered? | ✅ confident / ⚠️ uncertain | {reason if uncertain} |
57	
58	   Then apply the **iterative resolution loop** (max 3 iterations):
59

10	# Repository Scope & Search Scope Initialization
11	
12	## Overview
13	
14	Define scope first, then proceed with requirement clarification and solution design. `work_status.md` is the single context source for all subsequent skills.
15	
16	> ⚠️ **Scope restriction**: This skill **supports backend requirement development only**, including RPC services, HTTP API/BFF services, Admin backend interfaces, backend client repositories, and backend integration-test repositories. It does not handle **purely frontend code development tasks** (e.g. React/Vue components, HTML/CSS, frontend routing, etc.). `active_repos` **must only contain backend repositories** (including Server/Client/API/BFF/Autotest types). Adding purely frontend repositories to scope is prohibited. All subsequent code searches (`codebase_search`, `grep`, `read_file`, etc.) **are only allowed within backend repository paths**. Searching purely frontend repositories or frontend code directories is prohibited.
17	
18	**Announce at start:** "我正在使用 repo-scope-bootstrap 初始化工程作用域。"
19	
20	<HARD-GATE>
21	active_repos must use absolute paths that are locally accessible. Placeholders or relative paths are prohibited.
22	Always search for the repository in existing local workspaces first. Only clone when completely absent locally — clone into the same parent directory as `primary_repo`, not into any fixed global path. Do not guess paths.
23	</HARD-GATE>

25	## Execution Model
26	
27	This skill is **designed to run inside one isolated SubAgent session** so that KM reading, MCP inference, and repository-path discovery do not pollute the parent session context.
28	
29	Execution rules:
30	- **Preferred**: the parent session launches a single SubAgent via `Task`, and the SubAgent executes the whole skill flow
31	- **Inside this skill**: do **not** dispatch another Task / nested Agent
32	- **Manual confirmation point**: the SubAgent prepares `SCOPE_BOOTSTRAP_OUTPUT` and `【作用域确认】`; the parent session presents them to the user and waits for `确认`
33	- **After user confirmation**: resume the **same SubAgent** to continue branch/worktree/work_status writing and then hand off to `yx-pm-analyze-requirement`
34	- **Fallback**: if the runtime does not support `Task`, execute in the current session, but still follow the same summarization rules and never spawn a nested Agent

119	        - `FSD_ID`: extracted from `fsd_url` (e.g. `https://fsd.sankuai.com/req/view/12345` → `12345`)
120	        - `topic-slug`: requirement topic in kebab-case, 2–4 key words (e.g. `settle-rollback`, `campaign-change`)
121	    - **Example**: `feature/UMEFJ-2024-12345-settle-rollback`
122	
123	   **Do NOT run `git checkout -b` in the main working directory.** The main working directory stays on `master`. Pass the branch name directly to `yx-using-git-worktrees`, which will create the branch inside the worktree via `git worktree add -b`.
124	
125	   > ⚠️ **The main repo directory must always stay on `master`** — this is what enables true parallel development. Multiple requirements can coexist because each has its own worktree on its own branch.
126	
127	7. **Write work_status.md** — write after worktree is ready; path is `<primary_worktree_path>/docs/{name}-{YYYYMMDD}/work_status.md` where `primary_worktree_path` = the worktree path of `primary_repo` (e.g. `/abs/path/primary_repo/.worktrees/feature/xxx`), and `{name}-{YYYYMMDD}` is derived from the requirement topic and today's date. Contains active_repos, primary_repo, worktree_paths, domain_decision, fsd_url, km_links, docs_output, status, integration_test_repos, repo_md_path.
128	
129	   > ⚠️ **Critical**: `work_status.md` is written inside the worktree at `docs/{name}-{YYYYMMDD}/work_status.md`, NOT in `primary_repo/docs/`. All subsequent skills read `work_status.md` from the worktree path.
130	
131	8. **Bind branches for all scoped repos** — immediately after `work_status.md` is written, compute `bind_target_repos = active_repos`, then call `yx-bind-branch` **once per repo** using that repo's `worktree_path`.
132	
133	   - **Bind every scoped repo, including integration-test repos** — if this requirement spans `server + client + admin + autotest`, all corresponding branches should be bound to the same FSD requirement
134	   - **Binding and deployment are different sets** — `bind_target_repos` includes `integration_test_repos`, but later delivery-plan creation / deployment must still filter them out
135	   - **Pass explicit repo context** — each bind call should pass the repo/worktree path explicitly; never assume the caller's current directory already points at the correct repo
136	   - **Failure policy** — if any single repo binding fails, report the failed repo clearly and stop the bootstrap handoff so the missing binding is visible immediately
137	
138	9. **Enter requirement clarification** — only after all required repo bindings succeed, continue to `yx-pm-analyze-requirement` or the role-confirmation gate.
139	
140	## Repository Inference Chain (when user has not specified a repo)
141	
142	The inference chain has two steps; **execute in order, stop when a match is found**:
143	
144	```
145	Steps 1–2: MCP inference chain → match found → proceed to local path validation
146	```
147	
148	### Step 1: MCP — Get Full Domain List
149	
150	Call `searchKnowledge` to retrieve all domains and build a complete domain set.
151	Fixed parameters:
152	- `layerType=index`
153	- `knowledgeType=domain_boundary`
154	- `knowledgeSubtype=domain_boundary`
155	- `layer_index=1`
156	### Step 2: MCP — Get Target Domain Code Structure
157	
158	Based on the requirement description, match against the domain set to determine the target domain, then call `yuanxi_knowledge` (`knowledgeType=code_structure` and `layerType=index` and `sub_domains=[target domain]` and  `layer_index=2`) to extract:
159	- Repository name (repo)
160	- Key package paths, service roles
161	- Integration-test repository clues when available
162	
163	Save `repo.md` → `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}/repo/repo.md`
164	
165	This file is the local persisted result of Step 2 and should be reused by later skills for repository lookup, integration-test lookup, code search scope initialization, and domain / entrypoint / domain-name discovery.
166	
167	### Step 3: Local Path Validation and Clone if Needed
168	
169	After obtaining the repository name, search for its actual local path — **do not use path references from documentation directly (`~/workspace1/xxx` is a reference, not an absolute path)**.
170	
171	**Step 3-1: Search local workspaces**
172	
173	```bash
174	find ~/workspace ~/workspace1 ~/workspace2 ~/projects \
175	  -maxdepth 3 -name "{repo_name}" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -5
176	```
177	
178	Can also use `glob_file_search` (`**/{repo_name}/pom.xml`) to assist in locating, then use `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` to derive the root directory.
179	
180	- **Found** → validate (`git -C <path> status` returns no error) → record absolute path, skip Step 3-2
181	- **Not found** → proceed to Step 3-2
182	
183	**Step 3-2: Clone into the same parent directory as `primary_repo` (only when completely absent locally)**
184	
185	Derive the parent directory from `primary_repo` and clone there, keeping all repositories co-located:
186	
187	```bash
188	# Derive parent dir from primary_repo, e.g. primary_repo=/Users/foo/workspace1/project-A → parent=/Users/foo/workspace1
189	PARENT_DIR=$(dirname "{primary_repo_path}")
190	git clone <repo_remote_url> "$PARENT_DIR/{repo_name}"
191	```
192	
193	> If the remote URL is unknown, inform the user of the repository name inferred from MCP and ask them to provide the remote URL — **do not guess**.
194	
195	After cloning, use `git -C <path> rev-parse --show-toplevel` to get the absolute path and write it to `active_repos`.
196	
197	### Alignment Verification (required)
198	
199	After the repository is determined, back-verify the domain alignment against the requirement:
200	- Confirm the domain's responsibility scope **covers** the core business objects of this requirement
201	- If domain responsibilities do not match the requirement (e.g. requirement spans multiple domains), add related domain repositories to `active_repos`
202	- Write the alignment conclusion to `domain_decision`, explaining the reasoning
203	
204	#### 最小作用域原则（必须执行）
205	
206	`active_repos` 必须遵循 **minimum sufficient scope**，只保留完成当前需求所必需的仓库，禁止“为了保险起见”把可能相关但当前调用链未命中的仓库一并纳入。
207	
208	判定规则：
209	1. **先定主链路，再定仓库**：先明确本次变更的实际调用链，例如 `admin -> client -> server`、`api -> client -> server`、`job -> server`
210	2. **只纳入链路必经层**：仅将当前需求真实会修改、编译依赖或联调依赖的仓库加入 `active_repos`
211	3. **API/BFF 默认不纳入**：除非满足以下任一条件，否则不要把 `api` / `bff` 仓库加入作用域：
212	   - 需求明确发生在 C 端 / 对外 HTTP 接口 / 聚合接口层
213	   - 调用链明确为 `api/bff -> client -> server`
214	   - 需要在 API/BFF 层新增或修改 Controller、Facade、DTO、鉴权、接口聚合逻辑
215	4. **Admin 场景优先排除 API/BFF**：若需求明确是运营后台 / 管控台功能，且调用链为 `admin -> client -> server`，通常不应纳入 `api` / `bff` 仓库
216	5. **被排除仓库要写明理由**：对看起来“可能相关”但最终未纳入的仓库，需要在【作用域确认】中写明排除原因，避免用户误以为遗漏
217	
218	> ⚠️ 典型错误：只因为 MCP 命中了某个领域下同时存在 `server/client/api/admin` 多仓，就把它们全部加入 `active_repos`。正确做法是按本次需求的真实入口与调用链做最小收敛。
219	
220	#### 架构分层完整性检查（Thrift 场景，必须执行）
221	
222	当 `active_repos` 中包含 Thrift Server 仓库时，**必须**执行以下检查，不得跳过：
223	
224	1. 检查 MCP 返回的代码结构（`工程目录结构` 部分）中是否列出了对应的 **client 仓库**（通常命名含 `client`）
225	2. 若列出了 client 仓库 → **强制加入 `active_repos`**，无需用户确认
226	3. 完整调用链为：admin/api → **client（Thrift stub）** → server，client 是必改层，新增或修改接口时必须同步修改
227	
228	> ⚠️ **常见遗漏**：只看到 server 就停止，忽略 client。只要 server 有新 Thrift 接口，client 必须同步，否则调用方无法编译。
229	
230	#### 集成测试仓库检查（必须执行）
231	
232	当需求涉及后端接口、领域逻辑改造、域名/泳道联调或需要生成/执行集成测试时，**必须**继续检查是否存在对应的集成测试仓库：
233	
234	1. 优先从 MCP 返回的代码结构、历史工作区、本地同级目录中查找 autotest / onetest 仓库
235	2. 若已知对应测试仓库（如 `ad-shopdiy-autotest`），**强制加入 `active_repos`**，并在 `integration_test_repos` 中单独记录
236	3. 后续涉及测试代码检索、OneTest 生成执行、域名定位、测试数据文件定位时，优先读取本地 `repo_md_path`，不要重复猜仓库
237	4. 需要把“开发仓库 + 测试仓库 + 域名/调用链/包路径”沉淀到本地 md 文件，供后续 skill 直接消费
238	
239	### 【作用域确认】Output Format (⚠️ manual confirmation point)
240	
241	After alignment verification completes, output the following block and **wait for the user to reply "确认"** before proceeding to branch creation. If the user requests changes, re-infer from step 2/3.
242	
243	```
244	【作用域确认】⚠️ 需要确认
245	
246	◆ 涉及领域
247	· {领域名称}：{一句话说明该领域负责的业务范围}
248	· {领域名称2}（如有）：{说明}
249	
250	◆ 开发仓库
251	· 主仓库：{primary_repo 仓库名} — {仓库职责说明}
252	· 关联仓库：{active_repo 仓库名} — {仓库职责说明}（如有）
253	· 集成测试仓库：{autotest_repo 仓库名} — {测试代码仓职责说明}（如有）
254	
255	◆ 排除仓库（如有）
256	· {repo_name} — {为什么未纳入，例如“当前链路为 admin -> client -> server，不经过 api 层”}
257	
258	◆ 推断依据
259	· {说明如何匹配到该仓库：来自 MCP 推断 / 用户指定}
260	· {说明为何排除某些候选仓库：来自最小作用域原则 / 调用链判断}
261	
262	请确认以上作用域是否正确？回复「确认」继续，或说明需要调整的内容。
263	```

267	除 `work_status.md` 外，还必须额外写一份本地 repo 文档，路径固定为：

353	## Integration
354	
355	**Triggers:** After `yx-fsd-req-km-extractor` extracts `km_links`; or when a user proposes a new requirement and `work_status.md` does not yet exist or does not contain `active_repos`
356	
357	**Called by:** `yx-fsd-req-km-extractor` — automatically enters this step after the first step of extracting KM links completes
358	
359	**Recommended invocation:** the parent session launches **one** SubAgent to execute `yx-repo-scope-bootstrap`; after `【作用域确认】` is shown to the user and the user replies `确认`, resume the **same** SubAgent to continue the remaining steps
360	
361	**Calls:**
362	- `using-git-worktrees` — invoked immediately after auto-deriving the branch name; passes branch name + active_repos to the skill, which creates the feature branch and worktree in one step via `git worktree add -b`; the main working directory stays on `master` throughout
363	- `yx-bind-branch` — invoked immediately after `work_status.md` is written; call once per repo in `active_repos`, always using that repo's explicit worktree path
364	
365	
366	## Key Principles
367	
368	- Absolute paths are mandatory; relative paths are prohibited
369	- When the user adds repositories later, refresh `active_repos`, `integration_test_repos`, and sync-update `work_status.md`
370	- `repo_md_path` is the stable source for later repository search, integration-test lookup, and domain/entrypoint discovery
371	- All subsequent code searches must be executed within `active_repos`; drawing conclusions from searches outside scope is prohibited
372	- The MCP inference chain must be executed in order; skipping steps is not allowed
373	
374	## Common Mistakes
375	
376	| Mistake | Fix |
377	|---------|-----|
378	| Writing to work_status.md before alignment verification passes | Alignment verification must be complete before writing |
379	| Asking the user for a branch name | Auto-generate from FSD_ID + topic-slug without interrupting the user |
380	| Using relative paths | Always use absolute paths; obtain via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` |
381	| Cloning into a fixed global path (e.g. `~/.openclaw/workspace`) | Clone into the same parent directory as `primary_repo` to keep all repos co-located |
382	| Guessing when MCP inference fails | Clearly inform the user and request them to manually specify the repository path |
383	| Skipping alignment verification | Cross-domain requirements are common; must check domain responsibility coverage |
384	| Running `git checkout -b` in the main working directory | Do NOT run `checkout -b` anywhere in this skill. Branch creation is done exclusively by `yx-using-git-worktrees` via `git worktree add -b`. Main directory stays on `master` |
385	| Writing work_status.md to `primary_repo/docs/` | Must write to `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{name}-{YYYYMMDD}/work_status.md` — inside the worktree under the requirement folder, not the main repo directory |
386	| Skipping 【作用域确认】 and proceeding directly to branch creation | Must output 【作用域确认】 and wait for the user to reply "确认" before invoking `yx-using-git-worktrees` |
387	| MCP 返回了 client 仓库但未加入 active_repos | 只要 active_repos 含 Thrift Server，必须执行架构分层完整性检查，强制纳入 client 仓库 |
388	| 因为 MCP 返回了 api/admin/client/server 全家桶，就全部纳入作用域 | 必须执行最小作用域原则；按真实调用链收敛，只保留当前需求必经层 |
389	| Admin 管控台需求误纳入 API/BFF 仓库 | 若链路是 `admin -> client -> server`，默认排除 `api/bff`，除非需求明确要求改 API/BFF |
390	| 只记录开发仓库，遗漏集成测试仓库 | 需要测试代码生成、执行、域名/数据定位时，必须纳入 autotest 仓并写入 `integration_test_repos` 与 `repo_md_path` |
391	| 没有产出本地 `repo.md`，导致后续重复猜仓库 | `yx-repo-scope-bootstrap` 必须写 `repo_md_path`，后续 skill 优先读取该文件 |
392	| worktree 创建后只绑定了主仓库 | `yx-repo-scope-bootstrap` 必须对 `active_repos` 中的每个仓库逐一调用 `yx-bind-branch` |
393	| 把“绑定范围”和“部署范围”混为一谈 | 绑定使用 `active_repos` 全量；创建交付计划/部署时再过滤掉 `integration_test_repos` |
394	| 调用 `yx-bind-branch` 时依赖当前目录，结果重复绑定同一个仓库 | 绑定时必须显式传入 repo/worktree path，逐仓执行，禁止假设当前 cwd 正确 |
395

397	python3 ~/.claude/skills/yx-skill-timing/scripts/mark_skill_end.py yx-repo-scope-bootstrap
398	```

19	# FSD 分支部署
20	
21	通过 `fsd delivery create` 新建研发交付，再通过 `fsd delivery trigger` 触发部署。

28	|------|------|
29	| `service_names` | 要部署的应用/服务名称列表（支持单个字符串或列表）。串联调用时也接受上游 `service_name` 单个字符串 |

36	| `deploy_env` | 泳道 | 部署环境：DEV / TEST / 泳道 |

53	## 执行流程
54	
55	> 全程使用 `fsd` CLI（Bash 命令）完成，无需打开浏览器。
56	
57	### 🔁 重新部署（已有交付，仅部署变更服务）
58	
59	**当以下任一条件成立时，直接在已有交付上重新触发部署，不要新建交付：**
60	- 用户说"重新部署"、"重部署"、"再部署一次"
61	- `work_status.md` 中已有 `delivery_id` 或 `delivery_url`，且用户只是修改了代码/配置后想重跑
62	- 参数中明确传入了 `delivery_id` 或 `apply_program_id`
63	
64	**关键原则：只部署本次有代码变更的服务，不部署未改动的服务。**
65	
66	**重新部署命令（对每个变更服务单独触发）：**
67	```bash
68	# 仅触发单个服务的"部署服务"节点，跳过自测流水线
69	fsd delivery trigger \
70	  -i "{delivery_id}" \
71	  -a "{service_name}" \
72	  -n 部署服务 \
73	  --pretty
74	```
75	
76	> **参数说明：**
77	> - `delivery_id`：从 `work_status.md` 的 `delivery_id` 字段读取，或从 `delivery_url` 末尾截取数字
78	> - `-a`：指定单个服务名（如 `waimai_service_bizad_marketing_server`），**只部署有代码改动的服务**
79	> - `-n 部署服务`：只触发"部署服务"节点，**不触发整条自测流水线**（自测流水线耗时长，修复重跑阶段不需要）
80	
81	> ⚠️ **禁止行为：**
82	> - 不要用 `-n 构建部署` 或不加 `-n`（会触发整条流水线）
83	> - 不要对未改动的服务（如 client、admin）也触发部署
84	
85	> 完成后直接跳到 **Step 4** 更新 work_status.md，不需要执行 Step 0~3。
86	
87	---
88	
89	### Step 0：读取缺失参数
90	
91	若调用方未传入 `fsd_url`，先从 `work_status.md` 读取：
92	
93	```bash
94	WORK_STATUS=$(find . -name "*work_status.md" -path "*/docs/*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
95	# 从 work_status.md 提取 fsd_url 字段
96	```
97	
98	- **找到且非空** → 使用该值，继续执行
99	- **未找到或为空** → 报错退出："fsd_url 未传入且 work_status.md 中 fsd_url 字段为空"
100	
101	### Step 1：新建研发交付
102	
103	```bash
104	fsd delivery create \
105	  -e "{lane_type_param}" \   # 泳道类型：new-swimlane（新建）/ existing-swimlane（已有）
106	  -v                          # 输出完整 JSON，含 applyProgramId
107	```
108	
109	> **`-e` 参数映射：**
110	> - `lane_type` = "新建泳道" → `-e new-swimlane`
111	> - `lane_type` = "已有泳道"（默认）→ `-e existing-swimlane`
112	> - `deploy_env` = "TEST" → `-e test`
113	> - `deploy_env` = "DEV" → `-e dev`
114	
115	> CLI 会自动补全：分支（当前 git 分支）、服务（`service_names`）、Ones 工作项（从 `fsd_url` 提取的 reqId 关联）。
116	
117	从输出中提取 `applyProgramId`，记录为后续命令的 `-i` 参数值。
118	同时拼装 `delivery_url = "https://fsd.sankuai.com/testApplyDetail/{applyProgramId}"`。
119	
120	若创建失败 → 报错退出，列出失败原因。
121	
122	> ⚠️ **严禁用 `fsd delivery list` 验证是否创建成功**：`list` 默认只返回第 1 页（15条），当用户历史交付超过 15 条时，新建的交付不会出现在第 1 页，导致误判为创建失败。创建成功的唯一判断依据是 `fsd delivery create` 命令的返回值中包含 `applyProgramId`。如需二次验证，使用 `fsd delivery detail -i {applyProgramId}`。
123	
124	### Step 2：将 delivery_url 写入 work_status.md
125	
126	```bash
127	WORK_STATUS=$(find . -name "*work_status.md" -path "*/docs/*" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
128	if [ -n "$WORK_STATUS" ]; then
129	  if grep -q "^delivery_url:" "$WORK_STATUS"; then
130	    sed -i "s|^delivery_url:.*|delivery_url: {delivery_url}|" "$WORK_STATUS"
131	  else
132	    echo "delivery_url: {delivery_url}" >> "$WORK_STATUS"
133	  fi
134	fi
135	```
136	
137	### Step 3：触发泳道部署
138	
139	根据 `deploy_env` 选择触发命令：
140	
141	**泳道部署（默认）：**
142	```bash
143	fsd delivery trigger \
144	  -i "{applyProgramId}" \
145	  -n 部署环境 \
146	  --pretty              # 内置轮询，阻塞至终态后输出结果
147	```
148	
149	**TEST 骨干部署：**
150	```bash
151	fsd delivery trigger \
152	  -i "{applyProgramId}" \
153	  -n 构建部署 \
154	  --pretty
155	```
156	
157	**完整流水线：**
158	```bash
159	fsd delivery trigger \
160	  -i "{applyProgramId}" \
161	  --pretty
162	```
163	
164	> `--pretty` 内置轮询，会阻塞直到部署终态（成功/失败），可作为成功与否的第一层判断。
165	> 从输出中提取 `lane_name`（泳道名称）。
166	> 若触发结果为失败：
167	> - **明确是编译/构建失败**：直接返回编译失败信息，阻断后续流程。
168	> - **非编译失败**，或 **FSD 未返回明确异常原因**：必须调用 `yx-meituan-jumper` 登录失败节点排查启动日志（优先检查 `/var/sankuai/logs/*/start.log`、`/var/sankuai/logs/*/info.log`、`/var/sankuai/logs/*/error.log`、`/opt/meituan/logs/*/start.log`、`/opt/meituan/logs/*/info.log`、`/opt/meituan/logs/*/error.log`）。
169	
170	### Step 4：将泳道名称写入 work_status.md
171	
172	部署成功后，将泳道信息写入 `work_status.md`：
173	
174	```bash
175	WORK_STATUS=$(find . -name “*work_status.md” -path “*/docs/*” 2>/dev/null | head -1)
176	if [ -n “$WORK_STATUS” ]; then
177	  if grep -q “^deploy_swimlane:” “$WORK_STATUS”; then
178	    sed -i “s|^deploy_swimlane:.*|deploy_swimlane: {lane_name}|” “$WORK_STATUS”
179	  else
180	    echo “deploy_swimlane: {lane_name}” >> “$WORK_STATUS”
181	  fi
182	fi
183	```
184	
185	### Step 5：通过 OCTO 获取泳道机器节点 IP
186	
187	部署成功后，对每个已部署的 `service_name` 执行以下命令，从 OCTO 查询该泳道的机器 IP：

189	```bash
190	# 对每个应用查询其 OCTO 节点，按泳道名过滤
191	mtdev octo nodes {appkey} --env test 2>/dev/null
192	```
193	
194	> **appkey 与 service_name 的映射**：从 `fsd app find-by-appkey --appkey {service_name}` 的输出中提取 `appkey` 字段（格式如 `com.sankuai.xxx`）。若已知 appkey 可直接使用。
195	
196	过滤出 `Swimlane` 字段等于 `{lane_name}` 的节点，收集 `IP` 和 `Host Name`，构建 `apps[].nodes`。
197	
198	将节点信息写入 `work_status.md`：
199	
200	```bash
201	# 写入 apps 节点结构，供 yx-itest-runner / yx-java-hot-deploy 使用
202	# 目标结构：
203	# apps:
204	#   - name: waimai_service_bizad_marketing_server
205	#     appkey: com.sankuai.waimai.e.bizadmarketing
206	#     status: success
207	#     nodes:
208	#       - ip: 10.205.137.56
209	#         host: set-hlsc-waimai-a-bizadmarketing-test18
210	```
211	
212	> ⚠️ 若某应用在该泳道无节点（`Swimlane` 字段无匹配），记录 `nodes: []`，并在报告中说明该应用尚未部署到泳道。

121	## Step 4：失败诊断与修复
122

124	
125	### 4.1 判断是否需要修复
126	
127	- 所有用例 PASS → 跳转到 Step 5 生成最终报告
128	- 有 FAIL / ERROR → 进入 4.2 快速分类

130	### 4.2 快速分类（先排除环境问题）
131	
132	读取 `test-results.json` 中每条失败用例的 `error` 字段：
133	
134	| 失败特征 | 判断 | 后续 |
135	|---------|------|------|
136	| error 含 `"SSO"`、`"未找到节点"`、`"Connection refused"` | 环境/网络问题 | ⚠️ 提示用户检查环境，**停止**，不进入诊断，跳转 Step 5 生成报告 |
137	| error 含 `"timeout"`、`"超时"` | **可能是数据问题** | → 进入 4.3 深度诊断（重点查询数据库） |
138	| 接口返回了错误码或异常，非环境问题 | 业务逻辑/数据问题 | → 进入 4.3 深度诊断 |

140	### 4.3 深度诊断（修复前必须执行，禁止跳过）
141	
142	> ⚠️ **SubAgent isolation is REQUIRED for Step 4.3.** Dispatch a SubAgent via the `Task` tool to perform all log queries, code reads, and RDS database queries. The SubAgent collects all diagnostic evidence and writes a structured diagnosis conclusion to `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{需求名}-{YYYYMMDD}/integration-test/diagnosis-{timestamp}.md`. The SubAgent returns ONLY a ≤500-char `DIAGNOSIS_OUTPUT` to the main session. Raw log content, DDL, and query results must NOT be returned to the main session.
143	
144	SubAgent task prompt template:

10	# Code Quality Self-Optimization
11	
12	## Overview
13	
14	Perform systematic code quality optimization across the entire feature scope after all coding tasks are complete and all unit tests are green.
15	
16	**Announce at start:** "我正在使用 self-optimization 进行代码质量优化。"
17	
18	**REQUIRED BACKGROUND:** All tasks in tasks.md are marked `[x]` and the `tdd` status in work_status.md is `completed`.
19	
20	## When to Use
21	
22	**Use when:**
23	- Triggered from the tasks.md execution header (after all tasks complete and unit tests are green)
24	- Systematic code quality optimization is needed
25	
26	**Don't use when:**
27	- There are still incomplete tasks (complete all tasks first)
28	- Unit tests are failing (fix tests first)
29	- Only a partial codebase needs optimization (use `superpowers:refactoring` instead)
30

84	
85	## Optimization Dimensions
86	
87	### 1. Lint Check & Fix
88	- Run project lint tools (e.g. Checkstyle, PMD, SpotBugs)
89	- Auto-fix issues that can be fixed automatically
90	- Report issues requiring manual intervention
91	
92	### 2. Complexity Analysis
93	- Calculate cyclomatic complexity for each method
94	- Identify methods with complexity > 15
95	- Refactor high-complexity methods by business responsibility
96	
97	### 3. Naming Consistency Check
98	- Check naming consistency against entity mapping rules
99	- Unify naming style for variables, methods, and classes
100	- Fix inconsistent abbreviations
101	
102	### 4. Integration Test Generation
103	- Invoke `integration-test-gen` to generate end-to-end integration tests
104	- Verify correctness of the full feature chain
105	- Ensure integration tests pass
106	
107	### 5. Fast Fix Strategy After Integration Test Failure
108	
109	When integration tests fail, analyze the fix scope before deciding on a deployment approach:
110	
111	| Change Type | Criterion | Deployment | Time |
112	|-------------|-----------|------------|------|
113	| **Method body changes only** | Only internal method logic changed; no new/deleted classes, fields, method signatures, or dependencies | `yx-java-hot-deploy` hot push | 1–3 seconds |
114	| **Structural changes** | New classes/fields, modified method signatures, changed inheritance, adjusted pom dependencies | `yx-branch-deploy` full redeploy | 5–15 minutes |
115	
116	**Hot-deploy invocation:**
117	```bash
118	# Auto-detect Git-changed Java files and hot-push to swimlane server IP
119	<skill-path>/scripts/sonic-deploy.sh {swimlane server IP}
120	
121	# Hot-push specific file
122	<skill-path>/scripts/sonic-deploy.sh {swimlane server IP} /path/to/FixedService.java
123	```
124	
125	- Swimlane server IP is obtained from the `apps[].nodes` field in `work_status.md`
126	- **Immediately re-run integration tests** after a successful hot push — no need to wait for a build
127	- Hot-deploy is for dev/test swimlanes only; never for production
128

10	# Writing Plans
11	
12	## Overview
13	
14	Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.
15	
16	Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.
17	
18	> ⚠️ **Scope restriction**: This skill focuses exclusively on **backend coding plans** and does not handle any frontend code development tasks. Specifically:
19	> - ✅ **Includes**: Backend domain layer, application layer, infrastructure layer, and interface layer coding tasks (Java code, DB changes, MQ, scheduled tasks, etc.)
20	> - ❌ **Excludes**: Frontend page implementation tasks (e.g. React/Vue components, HTML/CSS, frontend state management, frontend API call layer, etc.)
21	>
22	> Task breakdown and code searches are **scoped to backend repositories only**. `active_repos` must never include frontend repositories. All `codebase_search`, `grep`, `read_file`, and similar code search operations **must be strictly limited to backend repository directories**. Searching frontend repositories or frontend code directories is prohibited. If design.md includes frontend change descriptions, only backend tasks are broken down in the coding plan; frontend implementation tasks are outside this skill's scope.
23	
24	**Announce at start:** "I'm using the yx-writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."
25	
26	**Context:** This should be run in a dedicated worktree (created by yx-using-git-worktrees skill).
27	
28	<!-- [YX-specific] Precondition: design.md already exists and has been approved; work_status.md status: design_approved -->
29	**REQUIRED BACKGROUND:** design.md already exists and has been approved; `work_status.md` contains `status: design_approved`.
30	
31	<HARD-GATE>
32	<!-- [YX-specific] Do not proceed if preconditions are not met -->
33	Do NOT proceed if design.md is not yet approved or `work_status.md` does not contain `status: design_approved`.
34	</HARD-GATE>
35	
36	**Save plans to:** `{primary_worktree_path}/docs/{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}/plan/tasks.md` — read `primary_worktree_path` and `{requirement name}-{YYYYMMDD}` from `work_status.md`; save inside the worktree under the requirement folder, NOT in `primary_repo/docs/`.
37	
38	## Bite-Sized Task Granularity
39	
40	**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
41	- "Write the failing test" - step
42	- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
43	- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
44	- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
45	- "Commit" - step
46	
47	<!-- [YX-specific] The original superpowers version applies TDD steps uniformly to all tasks; yx version adds Type A/B classification to distinguish business logic changes (mandatory TDD) from pure structural/I/O layer changes (compile-driven), avoiding forcing TDD on tasks that cannot be unit-isolated -->
48	## TDD Feasibility Classification (must determine for each task before writing steps)
49	
50	Before writing the steps for each task, **first determine which type the task belongs to** and strictly write steps according to the corresponding pattern:
51	
52	> **Core classification principle (language-agnostic)**:
53	> - **Type A**: The change includes business logic decisions (new or modified), and dependencies can be isolated via mock/stub → TDD mandatory
54	> - **Type B**: Pure structural change or external I/O layer change (cannot be isolated in-process) → compile/build driven
55	
56	### ✅ Type A: TDD-suitable (mandatory TDD steps)
57	
58	- New business logic methods (Service, utility class, calculation logic, state machine branches)
59	- New plugin/extension point implementations (dependencies replaceable with mock/stub)
60	- **Modifications to existing business flows** (write a failing test covering that path first, then change the implementation)
61	- Bug fixes (with a reproducible logic path)
62	
63	**Step template: Write failing test → run to confirm failure → write minimal implementation → run to confirm pass → commit**
64	
65	### ⚠️ Type B: Not TDD-suitable (use compile/build driven steps)
66	
67	**Pure structural changes or external I/O layer changes**, satisfying any one of:
68	- Pure structural changes: new fields, constants, enums, data classes, type definitions (no business logic)
69	- Configuration file changes: XML, YAML, properties, JSON config, `.env`, `tsconfig.json`, `webpack.config.js`
70	- Framework entry classes: MQ Consumer, scheduled task, HTTP Controller/Router skeleton (integration logic)
71	- **Storage layer changes**: DB (tables/fields/Mapper/SQL/Migration), cache (Redis/Memcached key operations), search engine (ES/OpenSearch index/mapping), and other external I/O layers
72	- **Frontend network layer changes**: new API call functions (axios/fetch wrapper), BFF interface integration (network-dependent, cannot unit-isolate)
73	- **Frontend pure display changes**: new static UI component skeleton, style files (no interaction logic)
74	
75	**Step template: Write the change → build verification (see tech-stack commands below) → commit**
76	
77	| Tech Stack | Build Verification Command |
78	|------------|---------------------------|
79	| Java (Maven) | `mvn compile -pl . -q` |
80	| Java (Maven, including test compile) | `mvn test-compile -pl . -q` |
81	| Go | `go build ./...` |
82	| Python | `python -m py_compile path/to/file.py` |
83	| TypeScript / React / Vue | `npx tsc --noEmit` or `npm run build -- --noEmit` |
84	| Node.js (JS only) | `node --check path/to/file.js` |

11	# Finishing a Development Branch
12	
13	## Overview
14	
15	完成开发收尾：验证测试 → Push 分支 → 创建 PR → 更新 work_status.md → 并行派发部署链路与 OneTest 产物生成。
16	
17	**Core principle:** Verify tests → Push + PR → Update work_status → Parallel SubAgents → OneTest runner.
18	
19	<!-- [YX-specific] The yx version does NOT perform Cleanup Worktree; the worktree is still needed for integration testing and code optimization afterward -->
20	<!-- [YX-specific] The yx version defaults to Option 2 (Push + PR) without asking the user; no interactive option selection -->
21	
22	**Announce at start:** "我正在使用 yx-finishing-a-development-branch skill 完成本次开发收尾。"
23	
24	<!-- [YX-specific] Read work_status.md before execution to extract all required fields -->
25	**REQUIRED BACKGROUND:** Read `work_status.md` before execution and extract:
26	- `fsd_url` — requirement page URL
27	- `primary_repo` — primary repository path (use the last segment as service_name, e.g. `waimai_service_bizad_marketing_server`)
28	- `active_repos` — all repositories involved
29	- `integration_test_repos` — test-only repos (e.g. `ad-shopdiy-autotest`); these must be **excluded** from deploy service_names
30	- `deploy_service_names` — derived field (NOT stored in work_status.md, computed here): last segment of each path in `active_repos` **minus** any path also listed in `integration_test_repos`. e.g. if active_repos has 4 repos and integration_test_repos has 1, deploy_service_names has 3. These are the only repos passed to yx-bind-branch and yx-branch-deploy.
31	- `topic` — requirement name
32	- `branch` — feature branch name
33	- `primary_worktree_path` — worktree path of primary repo
34	- `deploy_swimlane` / `delivery_url` / `apps` — existing delivery state if this flow is resumed
35	- `test_design_md_path` / `test_cases_json_path` / `test_data_plan_path` — existing OneTest docs if this flow is resumed
36	- `test_repo_path` / `test_repo_worktree_path` — existing test repo context if this flow is resumed
37	- `generated_test_summary_path` — single-file test summary if this flow is resumed
38	- `generated_test_java_files` / `generated_test_data_files` — generated assets if this flow is resumed
39	- `deploy_swimlane` / `delivery_url` / `apps` — existing delivery state if this flow is resumed
40	- `deploy_swimlane` / `delivery_url` / `apps` — existing delivery state if this flow is resumed

43	## The Process
44	
45	### Step 1: Verify Tests
46	
47	**Run tests in primary_worktree_path. For Java/Maven projects:**
48	
49	```bash
50	cd <primary_worktree_path>
51	mvn test -pl <module> -q 2>&1 | tail -20
52	```
53	
54	**If tests fail:**
55	```
56	测试失败（<N> 个失败）。必须修复后才能继续：
57	
58	[展示失败详情]
59	
60	测试通过前无法执行 Push/PR。
61	```
62	
63	Stop. Don't proceed to Step 2.
64	
65	**If tests pass:** Continue to Step 2.
66	
67	### Step 2: Push Feature Branch
68	
69	Push the feature branch for **all repos** listed in `active_repos` of work_status.md:
70	
71	```bash
72	cd <worktree_path>
73	git push -u origin <branch>
74	```
75	
76	Repeat for each worktree. If any repo's push fails, report the error and stop.
77	
78	### Step 3: Create PR
79	
80	Create a PR for the **primary repo** only:
81	
82	```bash
83	cd <primary_worktree_path>
84	gh pr create --title "<topic>：<branch>" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
85	## Summary
86	- 需求：{topic}
87	- FSD：{fsd_url}
88	
89	## 变更内容
90	<2-3 bullets of what changed>
91	
92	## Test Plan
93	- [ ] 单元测试全绿
94	- [ ] 集成测试验证
95	EOF
96	)"
97	```
98	
99	Record the PR URL returned by `gh pr create`.
100	
101	### Step 4: Update work_status.md
102	
103	After push and PR creation succeed, append the following to the `## Progress` section of `work_status.md`:
104	
105	```
106	- finishing-a-development-branch ✅ {YYYY-MM-DD} — Push完成（{N}仓库），PR已创建：{PR URL}，分支：{branch}
107	```
108	
109	Also append a new `## Delivery` section (if not already present) at the end of `work_status.md`:
110

113	pr_url: {PR URL}
114	push_repos:
115	  - {repo1}
116	  - {repo2}
117	  - {repo3}

123	> `deploy_swimlane`、`delivery_url` 与 `apps` 初始写入占位值；SubAgent A 完成后统一回填泳道、交付地址与机器节点信息。

243	| 5. SubAgent A | yx-bind-branch → yx-branch-deploy | 部署链路（节点由 OCTO 直接补全） |

245	| 7. OneTest Gate | 检查 generated_test_summary_path | 存在→直接执行；不存在→提示等待 QA，用户回复后 git pull 再验证 |
246	| 8. Integration | yx-itest-runner | Gate 通过后执行 |
247	
248	## Common Mistakes
249	
250	**Skipping test verification**
251	- **Problem:** Push broken code, create failing PR
252	- **Fix:** Always verify tests before push
253	
254	**Not updating work_status.md**
255	- **Problem:** Branch and PR info lost; subsequent sessions cannot trace delivery status
256	- **Fix:** Always append Progress entry and Delivery section to work_status.md after push + PR
257	
258	**Automatic worktree cleanup (YX)**
259	- **Problem:** Remove worktree prematurely; subsequent integration testing and optimization cannot continue
260	- **Fix:** The yx version never performs worktree cleanup
261	
262	**No confirmation for discard**
263	- **Problem:** Accidentally delete work
264	- **Fix:** If user explicitly requests discard, require typed "discard" confirmation before executing
265	
266	<!-- [YX-specific] The most common issue is forgetting to dispatch parallel SubAgents after push; the deployment chain and test case generation must be launched simultaneously -->
267	**Skipping parallel SubAgents after push (YX)**
268	- **Problem:** Finishing directly after push completes, without triggering deployment or generating OneTest assets, making integration testing impossible
269	- **Fix:** After push + PR, SubAgent A (deployment chain) and SubAgent B (OneTest asset chain) must be dispatched simultaneously — skipping is not allowed
270	
271	**Only binding primary repo in SubAgent A (YX)**
272	- **Problem:** SubAgent A only binds the primary repo, so client/admin/autotest sibling repos are missed and FSD sees an incomplete branch set
273	- **Fix:** SubAgent A must iterate over ALL `active_repos`, resolve each repo's `repo_path + worktree_path`, and call yx-bind-branch once per repo; only the later `yx-branch-deploy` input should be filtered to `deploy_service_names`
274	
275	**Including integration_test_repos in deploy service_names (YX)**
276	- **Problem:** `ad-shopdiy-autotest` and similar test repos end up being bound and deployed via yx-branch-deploy, which is wrong — they have no backend service process
277	- **Fix:** Always compute `deploy_service_names = active_repos minus integration_test_repos` before passing to SubAgent A; test repos are for integration testing only, never for deployment
278	
279	## Red Flags
280	
281	**Never:**
282	- Proceed with failing tests
283	- Skip updating work_status.md after push + PR
284	- Force-push without explicit request
285	<!-- [YX-specific] -->
286	- Skip parallel SubAgents after push
287	- Trigger yx-itest-runner before both SubAgents have returned
288	- Skip OneTest 产物存在性检查直接调用 yx-itest-runner（产物不存在时会立即报错）
289	- Ask user to choose options interactively (default is always Push + PR)
290	
291	**Always:**
292	- Verify tests before push
293	- Push all repos listed in active_repos
294	- Create PR for primary repo and record PR URL
295	- Update work_status.md with branch, PR URL, and Delivery section
296	- Compute `deploy_service_names` = last segments of `active_repos` minus any repo also listed in `integration_test_repos`
297	- SubAgent A must resolve each repo's `repo_path + worktree_path`, call yx-bind-branch once per repo in `active_repos`, then pass only `deploy_service_names` to yx-branch-deploy
298	- After push + PR, dispatch SubAgent A (deployment chain) + SubAgent B (OneTest asset chain) simultaneously
299	- Wait for both to succeed before triggering yx-itest-runner
300	- Keep worktree (still needed for subsequent integration testing)
301	
302	## Integration
303	
304	**Called by:**
305	- **subagent-driven-development** (Step 7) - After all tasks complete
306	- **executing-plans** (Step 5) - After all batches complete
307	
308	**Pairs with:**
309	- **using-git-worktrees** - Worktree created by that skill, preserved by this skill
310	
311	<!-- [YX-specific] Complete parallel flow -->
312	**完整流程：**
313	
314	```
315	Step 1: Verify Tests
316	Step 2: Push（all repos）
317	Step 3: Create PR（primary repo）
318	Step 4: Update work_status.md（Progress + Delivery）
319	Step 5: Announce + 派发 SubAgent A
320	    └── SubAgent A: yx-bind-branch → yx-branch-deploy（节点由 OCTO 直接补全）
321	              ↓（SubAgent A 完成）
322	Step 6: Git pull all repos（GATE 前置）
323	    └── 对所有 worktree（含 test_repo_worktree_path）执行 git pull
324	        pull 失败不阻断，记录警告后继续
325	Step 7: OneTest 产物存在性检查（GATE）
326	    ├── generated_test_summary_path 存在 → 直接调用 yx-itest-runner
327	    └── 不存在 → 输出等待提示，停止
328	              用户回复「继续执行集成测试」
329	              → git pull（test repo worktree）
330	              → 再次验证存在
331	              → 调用 yx-itest-runner
332	Step 8: yx-itest-runner
333	
334	```bash
335	python3 ~/.claude/skills/yx-skill-timing/scripts/mark_skill_end.py yx-finishing-a-development-branch
336	```

完成！我已经读取了所有 9 个技能文件。现在为你梳理完整的元析开发流程。

---

## 元析研发流程完整梳理

### **流程总览**

元析研发流程由 9 个 Skill 组成，形成一条从需求收集 → 方案设计 → 编码执行 → 集成测试 → 发布上线的完整研发链路。

---

## **详细流程顺序表**

| 序号 | Skill 名称 | 核心职责 | 输入 | 输出 | 上游 | 下游 |
|------|----------|---------|------|------|------|------|
| **1** | **yx-repo-scope-bootstrap** | 工程作用域初始化：确定涉及哪些仓库、定义开发作用域 | 需求 km_links、用户输入 | `work_status.md`（包含 active_repos、primary_repo、worktree 信息） | 无（首步） | yx-pm-analyze-requirement |
| **2** | **yx-pm-analyze-requirement** | 需求分析与澄清：转化产品需求为完整的验收标准 | work_status.md、需求描述、PRD | `requirement.md`（S3 链接）、prototype.md（原型交互点） | yx-repo-scope-bootstrap | yx-plan |
| **3** | **yx-plan** | 后端技术方案设计：设计数据库、接口、架构 | requirement.md、prototype.md、design.md | `design.md`、`design-interface.md`（S3 链接）、知识积累到 knowledge.md | yx-pm-analyze-requirement | yx-writing-plans |
| **4** | **yx-writing-plans** | 编码计划分解：将设计拆分为可执行的 bite-sized 任务 | design.md（已批准）、设计规范 | `tasks.md`（包含接口契约 C1、C2... 如有跨仓库依赖） | yx-plan | yx-interface-contract（可选）或 superpowers:subagent-driven-development |
| **5** | **yx-interface-contract** | 接口契约实现：为跨仓库依赖编写可编译的接口骨架 | tasks.md（包含 Interface Contracts 章节） | 编译通过的接口文件、数据类型骨架 | yx-writing-plans | superpowers:subagent-driven-development |
| **6** | **编码执行** (superpowers) | 执行任务：RD 按 tasks.md 逐个完成任务，单元测试全绿 | tasks.md、接口定义 | 完整代码、单元测试通过、git commits | yx-interface-contract 或 yx-writing-plans | yx-self-optimization |
| **7** | **yx-self-optimization** | 代码质量优化：lint、复杂度分析、命名一致性、集成测试生成 | 所有编码任务完成、单元测试全绿 | 优化报告、集成测试骨架（OneTest 产物） | 编码执行完成 | yx-finishing-a-development-branch |
| **8** | **yx-finishing-a-development-branch** | 开发收尾：验证测试 → Push 分支 → 创建 PR → 并行部署 & 集成测试 | work_status.md、本地代码变更 | PR 链接、部署链接、泳道信息、测试报告 | yx-self-optimization | yx-branch-deploy、yx-integration-test |
| **9** | **yx-integration-test** | 集成测试执行：在泳道上运行 OneTest 用例，验收功能完整性 | 泳道信息、test-cases.json、部署成功的应用 | 测试报告、集成测试通过 / 失败结果 | yx-finishing-a-development-branch | 完成 |

---

## **流程中的关键决策点与条件分支**

### **1. Scope Bootstrap → Requirement Analysis**
- **触发条件**：`work_status.md` 不存在或未包含 `active_repos`
- **关键输出**：`work_status.md`（所有后续 skill 的上下文源）
- **确认点**：【作用域确认】需用户手动确认（"确认"）

### **2. PM Analysis → Plan**
- **触发条件**：需求已锁定、`requirement.md` 已写入
- **关键输出**：`design.md` + `design-interface.md`（当满足条件时必产生）
- **确认点**：【后端方案确认】需用户手动确认
- **决策分支**：用户选择 1（RD 执行集成测试生成）or 2（QA 执行）

### **3. Plan → Writing Plans**
- **触发条件**：`design.md` 已批准、`status: design_approved`
- **关键输出**：`tasks.md`（≤15 个任务用 subagent-driven-development；>15 个用 executing-plans）
- **确认点**：无需用户确认，自动保存并进入编码

### **4. Writing Plans → Interface Contract（条件）**
- **触发条件**：`tasks.md` 包含 Interface Contracts 章节（有跨仓库 / 跨包依赖）
- **关键输出**：编译通过的接口文件
- **跳过条件**：`tasks.md` 无 Interface Contracts 章节 → 直接进入编码

### **5. Coding → Self-Optimization**
- **触发条件**：所有 tasks 标记 `[x]`、单元测试全绿
- **关键验证**：Lint 检查、复杂度分析、命名一致性
- **部署决策**：若集成测试失败 → 方法体改动用热部署、结构改动用全量重部署

### **6. Self-Optimization → Finishing**
- **触发条件**：代码质量优化完成
- **关键输出**：Push 所有 repos、创建 PR、部署链接
- **并行派发**：SubAgent A（部署链路）+ SubAgent B（OneTest 产物生成）

### **7. Finishing → Integration Test**
- **触发条件**：部署成功、`generated_test_summary_path` 存在
- **GATE 检查**：若 OneTest 产物不存在 → 等待 QA 完成，用户回复"继续执行集成测试"后继续
- **关键输出**：集成测试报告、通过 / 失败用例列表

---

## **工作状态文件（work_status.md）信息流**

```yaml
# 初始化（Scope Bootstrap）
primary_repo: /abs/path/...
active_repos: [/path/A, /path/B, ...]
integration_test_repos: [/path/autotest]
branch: feature/xxx
worktrees: [{repo, path}, ...]

# 需求锁定（PM Analyze）
requirement_md_path: /worktree/docs/.../requirement/requirement.md
requirement_s3_url: S3 链接
status: requirements_approved

# 设计完成（Plan）
design_md_path: /worktree/docs/.../plan/design.md
design_s3_url: S3 链接
design_interface_s3_url: S3 链接（如有）
status: design_approved

# 任务分解（Writing Plans）
tasks_md_path: /worktree/docs/.../plan/tasks.md
status: tasks_approved

# 编码完成（Self-Optimization）
status: coding_completed

# 部署链接（Finishing）
pr_url: GitHub PR 链接
deploy_swimlane: 泳道名称
delivery_url: FSD 交付链接
apps: [{name, status, nodes: [{ip, host}]}]
generated_test_summary_path: OneTest 产物路径

# 集成测试完成（Integration Test）
test_report_url: 学城文档链接
test_result_json_path: /worktree/docs/.../integration-test/test-results.json
status: completed
```

---

## **流程时间线与关键产物**

| 阶段 | 时间成本 | 关键产物 | 团队角色 |
|------|---------|---------|---------|
| Scope Bootstrap | 5-10 分钟 | work_status.md | RD + MCP 自动推断 |
| PM Analyze | 15-30 分钟 | requirement.md + prototype.md | PM + SubAgent 提取原型 |
| Plan | 30-60 分钟 | design.md + design-interface.md | RD 设计 |
| Writing Plans | 15-30 分钟 | tasks.md（含接口契约） | RD 分解 |
| Interface Contract | 10-20 分钟（可选） | 接口骨架文件 | RD |
| Coding | 2-4 小时 | 代码 + 单元测试 | RD（subagent 驱动） |
| Self-Optimization | 30 分钟 | 优化报告 + 集成测试骨架 | RD + 自动化工具 |
| Finishing | 10-15 分钟 | PR + 部署链接 | RD |
| Branch Deploy | 5-15 分钟 | 泳道 + 节点 IP | FSD + OCTO 自动补全 |
| Integration Test | 10-30 分钟 | 测试报告 + 通过率 | QA / RD（取决于 Plan 阶段选择） |

---

## **关键原则速记**

1. **绝对路径强制**：所有路径必须是绝对路径，不允许相对路径
2. **work_status.md 单一源**：所有后续 skill 都从这个文件读取上下文
3. **Worktree 长期保留**：分支完成后 worktree 不清理，后续还要用于集成测试和优化
4. **最小作用域原则**：`active_repos` 只包含当前需求必经的仓库，不"保险起见"扩张
5. **接口契约及时定义**：跨仓库依赖必须在编码前写出接口骨架，确保编译通过
6. **并行执行**：部署链路和 OneTest 产物生成同时派发 SubAgent，不串行等待
7. **GATE 检查**：集成测试前必须验证 OneTest 产物存在，不存在则等待 QA 完成

---

这就是完整的元析研发流程！从需求到上线，每个 skill 职责清晰，信息流通过 work_status.md 传递，支持并行执行和 worktree 隔离开发。
